title: Organizational Behavior
further_info: Recommended Reading Robbins, Judge, Campbell (2010): Organizational Behaviour Knights & Willmott (2017): Introducing Organizational Behavior and Management Lazear (2014): Personnel Economics in Practice Mensi-Klarbach & Risberg (2019): Diversity in Organizations: Concepts and Practices. Bendl, Bleijenbergh, Henttonen et al. (2017): The Oxford Handbook of Diversity in Organizations.
